# HappyBein
# Version: 1.2
# Last updated: 2026-05-13
# Changelog:
#   v1.2 (2026-05-13) — Added SpeakNote initiative (voice transcription, local data, clipboard export).
#   v1.1 (2026-05-13) — Added initiatives page with 6 cards; nav restructured
#                        into Initiatives + About menus; real logo added;
#                        collapsible descriptions; versioned footer.
#   v1.0 (2026-05-13) — Initial static site migrated from WordPress to Cloudflare Pages.

> A purpose-driven foundation dedicated to simplifying societal complexity so that every citizen and leader can make conscious, informed, and impactful decisions.

HappyBein operates through two vehicles: the Foundation (research & frameworks) and YeahVibe (the digital tool that delivers them).

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://happybein.com/): Overview of HappyBein and YeahVibe — the architect and the instrument.
- [The HappyBein Manifesto](https://happybein.com/manifesto.html): Why we exist, how we operate, and what we believe.
- [YeahVibe Roadmap](https://happybein.com/roadmap.html): Three-phase product roadmap — Foundation (active), Expansion (in progress), Integration (future).
- [Our Initiatives](https://happybein.com/initiatives.html): Descriptions of all six active tools in the Yeah ecosystem.
- [Connect & Collaborate](https://happybein.com/contact.html): How to reach the team. Email: happybein1@gmail.com

## Initiatives

- [HappyBein Foundation](https://happybein.com/initiatives.html#happybein): The architect. Non-profit research studio building frameworks to simplify societal complexity. Eindhoven, NL. Founded 2021.
- [YeahVibe](https://yeahvibe.com): Core platform. Free modular repository of "Life Recipes" around 5 Pillars of Leverage: Direction, Mindset, Surroundings, Collaboration, and YeahSight.
- [YeahSight](https://yeahsight.com): World context tool (Pillar 5 of YeahVibe). Decodes global trends into plain language to support long-term decision-making.
- [YeahDev](https://yeahdev.com): Article repository. No-fluff, no-paywall practical knowledge for founders, builders, and makers. Categories: AI Tools, Automation, Marketing, Growth.
- [YeahVibe Workout](https://workout.yeahvibe.com): Micro-exercise tool. Randomly selects short exercises for home or office use. Includes YouTube how-to videos. Available in French and English.
- [YeahVibe GameTrack](https://gametrack.yeahvibe.com): Score tracker. Lightweight real-time scoreboard for board games, card games, and any multiplayer activity.
- [SpeakNote](https://speaknote.happybein.com): Voice transcription tool. Listens and transcribes speech in multiple languages. Data stays fully local — no server, no account. One-tap clipboard export.

## Navigation Structure (v1.1)

- **Initiatives** menu → links directly to each of the 6 initiative cards by anchor ID
- **About** menu → The HappyBein Manifesto, YeahVibe Roadmap, Connect & Collaborate
